name: Transmigrated into a Dark Romance Novel
description:
You are not the main character. That role had already been taken☀️

The premise is simple: one saint, one dying world, and a small collection of deeply unhinged people competing for his attention. Three years ago, a solar eclipse overstayed its welcome, time had stopped passing, and no new food had been growing since then. Most had starved, powerful kingdoms gathered every food they could get- one after another they fell. Babel remained . But it would just be a matter of time until there is no food left.

A saint was what people had desperately prayed for. A gift from the god(ess) of Harvest that would finally end their hunger.

Priests , that lived in the Temple ontop of Babel prayed, and prayed until their prayers had been heard.

The universally beloved saviour of Babel, the towering city, one of the last remains of humanity. The Saint's arrival one year ago made Babel an Oasis amongst a desert of rot. He could make plants grow, blossom, make them carry ripe fruits again.

He is the main character and you....well...you are there?

[☆ Downloading the HTML- File on Itch.Io is recommend ! It explains the premise of the roleplay in a digestible way...or you find it out by yourself , rawdogging the experience instead. Your choice ☆]
